notes: Had 3 replies (story continues) — replies unretrievable due to provider ID truncation
text:
Venus in Gemini 2nd House, North Node in Libra 6th, currently in my Saturn Return in Aries 12th House. This one’s personal.
I grew up with nothing stable. No money, no safety net. So I trained myself to expect things to fail before they even start. It’s easier to brace for the worst than to hope and get let down again. Never went to university because school made me feel stupid, even though deep down I knew I wasn’t. Self doubt won that fight. So I took a retail job that was never supposed to last and stayed 9 years.
I climbed the ladder. Got to management. And then it hit me, my whole sense of worth was tied to that job and that paycheck, which wasn’t even much. I hated it. But it was familiar, and familiar felt safe.
